positive: A stylized, whimsical scene featuring a group of abstract geometric animals (e.g., cubist giraffe, minimalist fox, low-poly whale) interacting in a lush, bioluminescent jungle setting. The style should be highly detailed line art mixed with flat graphic design aesthetics, reminiscent of mid-century modern illustration combined with contemporary digital collage. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, with strong, defined silhouettes against a clean background. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of teal, coral, mustard yellow, and deep navy blue. Excellent contrast is key, making the subjects pop on fabric. Perfect for apparel print, vector style, high resolution, graphic novel feel.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, gradient sky, hyperrealism, photo, photography, logo, trademark, celebrity
